raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Role solidity check","name":"What's feeling solid in your role right now, and what's stretching you?","description":"Surfaces current confidence and areas of challenge in their role.","purpose":"competency","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback dynamics","name":"What's a piece of feedback you've received recently that has impacted you?","description":"Explores how feedback is influencing their development and role.","purpose":"topic","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Future role vision","name":"What specific role or responsibilities do you envision for yourself in the future?","description":"Identifies their aspirations and clarity on future roles.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Scope clarity","name":"What parts of your current role feel unclear or need more definition?","description":"Highlights areas where role expectations are vague.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Skill gap identification","name":"What skill do you feel you need to develop to reach your next career milestone?","description":"Pinpoints skills they believe are necessary for advancement.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Feedback loop","name":"How are you incorporating feedback from your team into your leadership style?","description":"Examines how they are using feedback to evolve as a leader.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Investment priorities","name":"If you could focus on one area for personal development, what would it be and why?","description":"Explores personal development priorities and reasoning.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Trade-offs","name":"What are you willing to deprioritize to focus on your growth goals?","description":"Identifies what they are willing to trade off to achieve growth.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Commitment to action","name":"What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?","description":"Establishes a specific goal or action to be achieved before the next meeting.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
